title.content: Two beach villas В· chef В· pool В· 58 people
title.wc_notes: NEW EN title (AirBnB had no EN version).

description.content:
The ideal space for your family or business gathering.

рҹҸ  Villa RincГіn del Mar вҖ” beachfront, direct sea access, 6 bedrooms for up to 28 guests.

рҹҸ  Villa RincГіn de las Morenas вҖ” beach a few steps away, 70 m from the other house, 6 bedrooms for up to 30 guests.

рҹҚі Chef, cook and houseman included in the rental.

вӯҗ More than 180 five-star reviews.
description.wc_notes: EN translation. Chef INCLUIDO declared upfront.

tu_propiedad.content:
We'll prepare a detailed proposal for your family or corporate gathering. Airbnb only allows 16 people in the system вҖ” message us with your dates, number of people and details to send you a complete proposal for up to 58 guests.

рҹҸ  WHAT THE COMBINED INCLUDES

Two villas 70 meters apart, both beachfront:

вң… Services included (no additional cost):
рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹҚі Chef Celene, cooks and houseman during your entire stay вҖ” meal preparation, elaborate menu available
рҹҘ© Grilling and seafood on our visible grill
рҹҸҠ Infinity pool (RdM) + private 11Г—5 m pool + kids' pool (Morenas)
рҹҸ–пёҸ Direct beach access in both villas
рҹӣҸпёҸ 12 bedrooms, 32+ beds, 13 baths
рҹ§№ Daily cleaning (weekly sheet change, towels every 3 days)
рҹҺө Audio system and TV
рҹӣ» Support renting vans for up to 20 people with/without driver
рҹӣҘпёҸ Coordination of yachts and boats

рҹӣҺпёҸ Optional services with cost:
рҹӣ’ Grocery shopping and stocking вҖ” transport and service charge 5%, min $450 MXN
рҹҚ№ Drinks at palapa-bar and beach
рҹ”Ҙ Beach bonfire
рҹҘҘ Fresh coconuts
рҹ’Ҷ In-house massages
рҹҗҙ Horseback riding
рҹҡЈ Coyuca Lagoon tour
рҹҺү Private dinners and events on request

Specialties:
Charcoal-grilled red snapper, Peruvian-style swordfish ceviche, Mexican/American/Argentine cuts perfectly done.

More than 180 five-star reviews. We help you plan: transport, beach events, excursions, diving, fishing, lagoon trips, water sports, massages вҖ” practically anything.

Welcome to Villa RincГіn del Mar and Villa RincГіn de las Morenas. Let the adventure begin.

acceso_huespedes.content: Guests enjoy all areas and facilities of both villas. Room service operates three days per week. For long stays, weekly sheet change.

interaccion_huespedes.content: Karina, our co-host, is available on the property to support you before and during your stay. We coordinate planning of excursions and activities, and resolve any questions via Airbnb message.

otros_detalles.content: Two beachfront villas 70 meters apart, ideal for groups of 30-58 people. For larger groups message us for personalized proposal. 35 min from airport, away from the bustle. Pets welcome. 2-night minimum; weekends may require 3.

вӣұпёҸвӣұпёҸвӣұпёҸ Welcome Kit вҖ” Combined (RincГіn del Mar + Las Morenas) вӣұпёҸвӣұпёҸвӣұпёҸ

We recommend the Acapulco-Zihuatanejo bypass from the last 'La Venta' toll booth вҖ” Google Maps/Waze will direct you that way. Highway to the coast, then 15 km by road.

manual_casa.content:
Welcome to the two villas RincГіn del Mar + Las Morenas рҹҢ…

рҹ“¶ WiFi
RdM: network 'rincondelmar' В· password 'rincondelmar'
Morenas: network 'Rincondelmar1' В· password 'Rincondelmar1'

рҹ”Ҙ Water heaters / hot water
Water heaters are normally off вҖ” water arrives warm. If you prefer hot water: turn on the heater behind the kitchen (each villa).

рҹ”’ Safe boxes
Each bedroom has a safe. Karina gives you the access code at check-in. We are not responsible for valuables not kept in the safes.

рҹҸҠ Pools
RdM: infinity facing the ocean В· Morenas: private 11Г—5 m + kids' pool 4Г—3 m. Maintained daily.

рҹҚі Kitchens
Fully equipped in both villas. Chef Celene and team manage the areas during your stay.

рҹ§№ Cleaning
Daily service. Weekly sheet change. Towels every 3 days.

рҹҡҝ Towels
Bath and beach included in both villas.

рҹӣ’ Last-minute shopping
OXXO 100 m from RdM. 'El GГјero' store 400 m. Tortilla shop 300 m.

рҹҡЁ Emergencies
Karina available during your stay вҖ” on either property or via Airbnb message.

вҖ” Alexander рҹҢ…

instrucciones_salida.content:
Check-out 11 AM. Before leaving, please:

вҖ” Turn off A/C, fans and lights in both villas
вҖ” Leave the keys in the lockboxes at the entrances
вҖ” If you used the bedroom safes, leave them open and empty
вҖ” Notify Karina that you've left

If you need late checkout, let us know in advance.

Thank you for choosing us!

вҖ” Alexander рҹҢ…
